module.name: matrix
module.description: 2×2 quadrant matrix (e.g. impact/effort, importance/urgency) with axis labels. Body = 4 sections in reading order (top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right).
module.aiSpec:
A 2×2 QUADRANT MATRIX for positioning / prioritisation (Eisenhower, impact-effort, risk-reward, BCG). Use this for a labelled 2×2 grid; for a numeric scatter use @scatter, and for arbitrary side-by-side blocks use @multicolumn. Block module: the body is FOUR sections split by <!-- @ -->, in reading order — top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right. Each cell is Markdown (a heading + bullets works well). Parameters: • xLabel / yLabel — names of the horizontal / vertical axis (default blank). • xLow / xHigh — labels for the left / right end of the X axis (default blank). • yLow / yHigh — labels for the bottom / top end of the Y axis (default blank). • color — accent color for borders, axis labels and cell tint (default var(--accent-color)). • gap — CSS length of the space between the four cells (default 6px). • radius — CSS corner radius of each cell (default 8px). • minHeight — CSS min-height of each cell (default 3.5em). • fill — cell background tint strength, percent 0-100 (default 6; the top-left cell gets twice this).
<!-- @matrix xLabel: Effort, yLabel: Impact, xLow: Low, xHigh: High, yLow: Low, yHigh: High, fill: 10 --> **Quick wins** <!-- @ --> **Major projects** <!-- @ --> **Fill-ins** <!-- @ --> **Thankless tasks** <!-- @end -->

param.name: xLabel
param.label: X axis label
param.desc: Name of the horizontal axis (shown below the grid).

param.name: yLabel
param.label: Y axis label
param.desc: Name of the vertical axis (shown rotated at the left).

param.name: xLow
param.label: X low (left) label
param.desc: Label for the left (low) end of the X axis.

param.name: xHigh
param.label: X high (right) label
param.desc: Label for the right (high) end of the X axis.

param.name: yLow
param.label: Y low (bottom) label
param.desc: Label for the bottom (low) end of the Y axis.

param.name: yHigh
param.label: Y high (top) label
param.desc: Label for the top (high) end of the Y axis.

param.name: color
param.label: Accent color
param.desc: Color for cell borders, axis labels and cell tint.

param.name: gap
param.label: Cell gap
param.desc: CSS length of the gap between the four cells (e.g. 6px, 0.5rem).

param.name: radius
param.label: Cell corner radius
param.desc: CSS corner radius of each cell (e.g. 8px, 0.5rem).

param.name: minHeight
param.label: Cell min height
param.desc: CSS minimum height of each cell (e.g. 3.5em, 120px).

param.name: fill
param.label: Cell tint %
param.desc: Background tint strength of the cells (0 = none); the top-left cell uses twice this.

snippet.label: 2×2 matrix
snippet.text: <!-- @matrix xLabel: Effort, yLabel: Impact, xLow: Low, xHigh: High, yLow: Low, yHigh: High --> **Quick wins** - do these first <!-- @ --> **Big bets** <!-- @ --> **Maybe later** <!-- @ --> **Avoid** <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Four quadrants (TL, TR, BL, BR) with labelled axes.
